title: Bathroom Set Accessories 3Pcs Soap dispenser Toothbrush Holder Cup Soap dish, Set of 3 Bathroom Accessories, Bathroom Decoration in PP, Modern and Practical Design (Grey)
features: Organize your everyday accessories such as soap, toothbrush and toothpaste with our Envenzo Bathroom set.
Package includes 1 x liquid soap dispenser, 1 x toothpaste or cosmetic cup and 1 x tray

The set is made of polystyrene and fits any type of bathroom furniture. The PU coating makes the polystyrene durable and water resistant and prevents it from being damaged when in contact with water and moisture.
The material of this set is almost entirely made from a renewable resource. The use does not pose a burden on the environment.
Measurements approx. : Dispenser: 7.3 x 7.3 x 17 cm. Brush Holder: 7.3 x 7.3 x 11 cm Soap Dish: 15 x 7.3 x 1.5 cm The soap dish can also be used as a tray to place the dispenser and brush holder.
